title: evolvulus sericeus var. sericeus
intro: Evolvulus sericeus var. sericeus, also known as Silver Fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the family Convolvulaceae. It is a perennial herb with leaves and stems covered in a fine, silver-gray pubescence. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Evolvulus sericeus var. sericeus include wound healing, antiseptic properties, and relief from respiratory issues, and it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for various herbal applications.
